nasb.text: Now the cities at the extremity of the tribe of the sons of Judah toward the border of Edom in the south were Kabzeel and Eder and Jagur,

esv.text: The cities belonging to the tribe of the people of Judah in the extreme south, toward the boundary of Edom, were Kabzeel, Eder, Jagur,

cnv.text: 猶大支派極南邊的眾城，接近以東邊界的，有：甲薛、以得、雅姑珥、

ccb.text: 在最南面靠近以东的城邑有甲薛、以得、雅姑珥、
